headline: Agent orchestration and multi-model routing dominate the window as a cluster of browser sandboxing techniques breaks out.
body: Routing and orchestration moved to center: Omnigent positions itself as a meta-harness coordinating Claude Code, Codex, and Pi as interchangeable workers, while OpenRouter's Fusion API routes prompts across multiple models with a judge model to synthesize responses, though real-world results were inconsistent and sometimes slower and costlier than single strong models. Ensemble methods leads the movers alongside debugging, developer productivity, and product focus, reflecting heavy coverage of AI pair programming and skepticism toward fully generated code. A fresh cluster of browser security techniques broke out around double iframe sandboxing, covering sandbox attribute, Content Security Policy, srcdoc, storage isolation, and origin isolation as MCP and ChatGPT apps enforce boundaries. Commentary also weighed whether AI models are commoditizing amid OpenAI price cuts and Anthropic's flubbed Fable rollout, which pushed renewed interest in local inference and open models.
